payload.text:
Dévéloppe et implemente minutieusement tous ses écrans dans l'appli Krypton AI et rend la fonctionnelle à 100% sans bug sans lien mort, Krypton AI est une plateforme opérationnelle pour promouvoir les services de Koffmann Group à travers sa marque commercial *Krypton IA*. Vous pouvez créer des liens dynamiques vers des images à partir de HTML

Parfait. Là on passe en **mode direction artistique + product design enterprise** 🎯
Je vais te livrer **des sous-prompts techniques ultra détaillés**, **prêts à être utilisés dans Google Stitch**, pour construire **chaque écran** de Krypton AI avec :

* un **branding à couper le souffle**
* une **harmonie parfaite avec le logo Krypton AI** (hexagone rouge + K)
* une **esthétique futuriste, premium, crédible Google-level**
* une **logique produit SaaS + agence IA**

Je vais raisonner comme un **Head of Design + Chief Product Officer**.

---

# 🧬 ADN VISUEL DE KRYPTON AI (BASE OBLIGATOIRE)

À injecter **dans TOUS les prompts Stitch** 👇

```
Brand DNA:
- Name: Krypton AI
- Positioning: Ultra-premium AI-powered digital agency & platform
- Core values: Power, Intelligence, Precision, Trust, Automation
- Visual identity inspired by the logo:
  - Hexagonal geometry
  - Sharp angles
  - Controlled aggressiveness
  - Red as power, black as authority, white as clarity

Color palette:
- Krypton Red: #E10600 (primary power color)
- Deep Black: #0B0B0F (background dominance)
- Carbon Gray: #1A1A1F (surfaces)
- Pure White: #FFFFFF (text contrast)
- Subtle Neon Red glow for highlights (very restrained)

Typography:
- Primary: Inter / Space Grotesk / Manifold-style
- Headlines: Bold, condensed, confident
- Body: Clean, readable, enterprise-grade

UI Style:
- Dark mode first
- Glassmorphism VERY subtle
- Micro-glows on hover
- Smooth motion (no playful animations)
- “Google meets Palantir meets high-end AI lab”
```

---

# 🖥️ ÉCRAN 1 — HOME / LANDING PAGE

### 🎯 Objectif

Impression immédiate de **puissance, intelligence, sérieux**
→ “Cette entreprise domine son sujet”

### 🔥 PROMPT GOOGLE STITCH

```
Design a premium dark-mode landing page for an AI-powered digital agency named "Krypton AI".

Hero section:
- Full-width dark background (#0B0B0F)
- Large bold headline:
  "Dominate your market with Artificial Intelligence"
- Subtitle:
  "Krypton AI designs autonomous AI systems that attract, convert and manage clients without human intervention."
- Strong CTA buttons:
  [Talk to an AI Strategist] (primary red)
  [Explore Our Solutions] (secondary outline)

Visual elements:
- Abstract hexagonal grid inspired by the Krypton AI logo
- Subtle red neon lines flowing like data circuits
- Floating AI nodes connected by thin glowing lines
- No stock photos, only abstract AI visuals

Sections:
1. What makes Krypton AI different (3 cards)
   - Autonomous AI Agents
   - AI-powered Growth Systems
   - Enterprise-grade Architecture

2. AI Agents in action
   - Cards showing different AI agents (Web, Marketing, CRM, Voice)
   - Each card feels like a “digital employee”

3. Industries served
   - Grid layout with icons
   - Business, Insurance, Real Estate, HR, E-commerce, Services

4. Final CTA
   - "Let AI work while you scale"
   - Strong red gradient background

Style constraints:
- Sharp angles
- Hexagonal motifs
- High contrast
- Enterprise SaaS aesthetic
```

---

# 🤖 ÉCRAN 2 — PAGE “AGENTS IA”

### 🎯 Objectif

Faire comprendre que **chaque agent = un expert humain augmenté**

### 🔥 PROMPT STITCH

```
Design a product page for "Krypton AI Agents".

Layout:
- Dark futuristic interface
- Central AI core visual (hexagonal shape)
- AI agents orbiting around it

Each AI agent card includes:
- Agent name (e.g. Web AI, Marketing AI, Voice AI)
- Short mission description
- Capabilities list:
  - Understand user intent
  - Speak naturally
  - Qualify leads
  - Schedule meetings
  - Trigger workflows

Interaction design:
- Hover effect with red glow
- Cards feel alive, intelligent, autonomous

Tone:
- Serious
- Strategic
- No playful or cartoon visuals

Overall feeling:
“This replaces an entire team.”
```

---

# 🎙️ ÉCRAN 3 — AGENT IA VOCAL

### 🎯 Objectif

Créer une **expérience futuriste mais humaine**

### 🔥 PROMPT STITCH

```
Design a voice AI interface for Krypton AI.

UI elements:
- Central animated waveform (subtle, elegant)
- No text transcription visible
- Status indicator: "Listening", "Thinking", "Responding"

Design language:
- Minimal
- High-tech
- Trustworthy

Copy:
- "Speak naturally. Krypton AI understands."

Background:
- Dark gradient with soft red pulses
- Hexagonal echo patterns reacting to voice

Feeling:
- Talking to a senior business advisor, not a bot
```

---

# 📊 ÉCRAN 4 — CRM IA

### 🎯 Objectif

Montrer un **cerveau central business**

### 🔥 PROMPT STITCH

```
Design an AI-powered CRM dashboard for Krypton AI.

Dashboard layout:
- Left sidebar (Clients, Leads, Agents, Analytics, Settings)
- Main dashboard with:
  - AI insights cards
  - Lead scoring visualization
  - Conversion predictions
  - Agent activity logs

Visual style:
- Dark enterprise dashboard
- Red used only for important insights
- Clean data visualizations
- No clutter

Tone:
- Control
- Intelligence
- Strategic dominance
```

---

# 🕷️ ÉCRAN 5 — DATASCRAPER

### 🎯 Objectif

Sentiment de **machine de renseignement business**

### 🔥 PROMPT STITCH

```
Design a data intelligence and web scraping module.

Interface:
- Dark terminal-inspired UI
- Data streams flowing in real time
- Filters and selectors for industries, locations, company size

Visual metaphors:
- Radar
- Data pipelines
- Intelligence grid

Copy tone:
- Precise
- Tactical
- Professional

Overall feeling:
"Business intelligence weaponized by AI"
```

---

# ⚙️ ÉCRAN 6 — ARCHITECTURE & CONFIANCE

### 🎯 Objectif

Rassurer **grands comptes & institutions**

### 🔥 PROMPT STITCH

```
Design a trust & architecture page for Krypton AI.

Sections:
- Firebase backend architecture diagram
- Security & compliance highlights
- Scalability explanation
- AI governance & control

Design:
- Clean diagrams
- White text on dark background
- Red used only for key nodes

Tone:
- Enterprise
- Reliable
- Google-level infrastructure
```

---

# 🧠 RÈGLE D’OR (TRÈS IMPORTANT)

👉 **AUCUN écran ne doit sembler “marketing classique”**
👉 **Chaque écran doit sembler conçu par une entreprise qui maîtrise l’IA mieux que ses clients**

---
